/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/app/App.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/app/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/core/BackgroundManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/core/FrameLimiter.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/core/Styles.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/network/LoaderFetcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/network/McVersionFetcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/network/ResourceFetcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/DownloadPage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/LaunchPage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/McVersionDetailPage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/MorePage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/PageSetupStubs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/ResourceDetailPage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/pages/SettingsPage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/util/FontHelper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/util/IconHelper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/widgets/HeaderTabs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/widgets/NotificationDrawer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/widgets/NotificationToast.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/pcl-cgre.dir/widgets/ResourceItem.cpp.o" ../../libpclcore/CMakeFiles/pclcore_objs.dir/src/core/Log.cpp.o ../../libpclcore/CMakeFiles/pclcore_objs.dir/src/local/Instance.cpp.o ../../libpclcore/CMakeFiles/pclcore_objs.dir/src/local/DownloadTask.cpp.o ../../libpclcore/CMakeFiles/pclcore_objs.dir/src/network/Dispatcher.cpp.o ../cli/CMakeFiles/cli_objs.dir/CliCommands.cpp.o -o ../../pcl-cgre  -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ladwaita-1 -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lfontconfig -lcurl -ladwaita-1 -lfontconfig -lcurl
